note: 抽出精度ベンチマーク用 20 項目スキーマ（README §6.2）。f01〜f15 は anchor-spike/schema/mini-schema.json をそのまま含める（スパイクとの比較可能性を保つため文言不変）。f16〜f20 は表由来項目と not_reported の多様性を増やす追加分。

fields.extraction_instruction: Study design as described by the authors (e.g. randomized controlled trial; note parallel/crossover, blinding label if part of the design description).
Country or countries where the study was conducted.
Total number of participants randomized (not screened, not analyzed).
Short description of the study population / key eligibility criteria.
How the random allocation sequence was generated (e.g. computer-generated, block randomization).
Who was blinded (participants, personnel, outcome assessors), or state that the trial was open-label.
Trial registration identifier (e.g. NCT number, IRCT number).
Definition of the primary outcome, including time point of assessment if reported.
Name of this study arm as used by the authors (e.g. thermotherapy group, control group).
Number of participants randomized to this arm.
What participants in this arm received (agent, dose, route, frequency, duration; or the comparator condition).
Result of the primary outcome in this arm exactly as reported (e.g. n/N (%), mean ± SD). Prefer the results table if reported there.
Number (%) of participants with at least one adverse event in this arm, as reported. Prefer the results/AE table if reported there.
Between-group effect estimate for the primary outcome with 95% CI, exactly as reported (e.g. risk difference, mean difference).
P value for the between-group comparison of the primary outcome, as reported.
Mean (or median) age of participants in this arm, as reported in the baseline table.
Percentage (or number) of female participants in this arm, from the baseline table.
Length of follow-up / study duration, as reported in the text.
Number of participants analyzed in this arm (analysis set, not the number randomized).
Source(s) of study funding.
